noticias.titulo: Here’s why some people choose cryonics to store their bodies and brains after death
noticias.descripcion: This week I reported on some rather unusual research that focuses on the brain of L. Stephen Coles. Coles was a gerontologist who died from pancreatic cancer in 2014.
